gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just swept through the README to keep the latest news and community apps fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community applications.
gist.impact: Visitors to the GitHub repository will see the most up-to-date community highlights and news.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee organizing a bulletin board or painting a sign that says 'NEWS'. The robot is holding a stack of papers (news), and Polly is pinning them up.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head handing papers to a tiny bee mascot who is pinning them to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font on the board: 'NEWS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
